message:
chore(engine): add e2e replay and contract suite runner scripts

- scripts/e2e/lockstep_runner_replay.sh: E2E replay harness for lockstep
  runner verification
- scripts/e2e/persistent_cache_contract_replay.sh: E2E replay for
  persistent cache contract validation
- scripts/e2e/seqlock_reader_writer_contract_replay.sh: E2E replay for
  seqlock reader/writer contract
- scripts/run_persistent_cache_contract_suite.sh: Orchestrates the full
  persistent cache contract test suite
- scripts/run_seqlock_reader_writer_contract_suite.sh: Orchestrates the
  full seqlock reader/writer contract test suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,192 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+root_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+cd "$root_dir"
+
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
+rch_build_timeout_sec="${RCH_BUILD_TIMEOUT_SEC:-1800}"
+artifact_root="${PERSISTENT_CACHE_CONTRACT_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/persistent_cache_contract}"
+timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/var/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_persistent_cache_contract_${timestamp}}"
+generated_at_utc="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
+run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
+manifest_path="${run_dir}/suite_run_manifest.json"
+trace_id="${PERSISTENT_CACHE_TRACE_ID:-trace.rgc.610a}"
+decision_id="${PERSISTENT_CACHE_DECISION_ID:-decision.rgc.610a}"
+policy_id="${PERSISTENT_CACHE_POLICY_ID:-policy.rgc.610a}"
+run_id="run-persistent-cache-contract-${timestamp}"
+source_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"
+suite_commands_path="${run_dir}/suite_commands.txt"
+
+mkdir -p "$run_dir"
+
+run_rch() {
+  RCH_BUILD_TIMEOUT_SEC="${rch_build_timeout_sec}" \
+    rch exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" "$@"
+}
+
+declare -a commands_run=()
+failed_command=""
+manifest_written=false
+
+run_step() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  shift
+  commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  echo "==> $command_text"
+  if ! run_rch "$@"; then
+    failed_command="$command_text"
+    return 1
+  fi
+}
+
+verify_bundle() {
+  local artifact
+  for artifact in \
+    persistent_cache_contract.json \
+    run_manifest.json \
+    events.jsonl \
+    commands.txt \
+    trace_ids.json \
+    env.json \
+    manifest.json \
+    repro.lock \
+    summary.md; do
+    [[ -f "${run_dir}/${artifact}" ]] || {
+      echo "missing required artifact: ${artifact}" >&2
+      return 1
+    }
+  done
+
+  jq -e '.schema_version == "franken-engine.rgc-persistent-cache-contract.v1"' \
+    "${run_dir}/persistent_cache_contract.json" >/dev/null
+  jq -e '(.receipts | length) >= 2 and (.scenarios | length) >= 5' \
+    "${run_dir}/persistent_cache_contract.json" >/dev/null
+  jq -e '.schema_version == "franken-engine.rgc-persistent-cache-run-manifest.v1"' \
+    "${run_dir}/run_manifest.json" >/dev/null
+}
+
+run_mode() {
+  case "$mode" in
+    check)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract
+      ;;
+    test)
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract
+      ;;
+    clippy)
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    run)
+      run_step "cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- --artifact-dir ${run_dir} --trace-id ${trace_id} --decision-id ${decision_id} --policy-id ${policy_id} --run-id ${run_id} --generated-at-utc ${generated_at_utc} --source-commit ${source_commit} --toolchain ${toolchain} --summary" \
+        cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- \
+          --artifact-dir "${run_dir}" \
+          --trace-id "${trace_id}" \
+          --decision-id "${decision_id}" \
+          --policy-id "${policy_id}" \
+          --run-id "${run_id}" \
+          --generated-at-utc "${generated_at_utc}" \
+          --source-commit "${source_commit}" \
+          --toolchain "${toolchain}" \
+          --summary
+      verify_bundle
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test persistent_cache_contract --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- -D warnings
+      run_step "cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- --artifact-dir ${run_dir} --trace-id ${trace_id} --decision-id ${decision_id} --policy-id ${policy_id} --run-id ${run_id} --generated-at-utc ${generated_at_utc} --source-commit ${source_commit} --toolchain ${toolchain} --summary" \
+        cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_persistent_cache_contract -- \
+          --artifact-dir "${run_dir}" \
+          --trace-id "${trace_id}" \
+          --decision-id "${decision_id}" \
+          --policy-id "${policy_id}" \
+          --run-id "${run_id}" \
+          --generated-at-utc "${generated_at_utc}" \
+          --source-commit "${source_commit}" \
+          --toolchain "${toolchain}" \
+          --summary
+      verify_bundle
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|run|ci]" >&2
+      exit 2
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local outcome dirty_worktree idx comma
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi
+  manifest_written=true
+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    outcome="pass"
+  else
+    outcome="fail"
+  fi
+
+  if git diff --quiet --ignore-submodules HEAD -- >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    dirty_worktree=false
+  else
+    dirty_worktree=true
+  fi
+
+  printf '%s\n' "${commands_run[@]}" >"${suite_commands_path}"
+
+  {
+    echo "{"
+    echo '  "schema_version": "franken-engine.rgc-persistent-cache-run-manifest.v1",'
+    echo '  "component": "persistent_cache_contract_suite",'
+    echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\","
+    echo "  \"trace_id\": \"${trace_id}\","
+    echo "  \"decision_id\": \"${decision_id}\","
+    echo "  \"policy_id\": \"${policy_id}\","
+    echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\","
+    echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\","
+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${source_commit}\","
+    echo "  \"dirty_worktree\": ${dirty_worktree},"
+    echo "  \"generated_at_utc\": \"${generated_at_utc}\","
+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\","
+    if [[ -n "${failed_command}" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\","
+    fi
+    echo '  "commands": ['
+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$((${#commands_run[@]} - 1))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "artifacts": {'
+    echo "    \"command_log\": \"${suite_commands_path}\","
+    echo "    \"contract\": \"${run_dir}/persistent_cache_contract.json\","
+    echo "    \"runner_manifest\": \"${run_dir}/run_manifest.json\","
+    echo "    \"suite_manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"trace_ids\": \"${run_dir}/trace_ids.json\""
+    echo '  },'
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/persistent_cache_contract.json\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/run_manifest.json\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"${0} ci\""
+    echo '  ]'
+    echo "}"
+  } >"${manifest_path}"
+}
+
+trap 'write_manifest $?' EXIT
+run_mode

@@ -0,0 +1,197 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+root_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+cd "$root_dir"
+
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
+rch_build_timeout_sec="${RCH_BUILD_TIMEOUT_SEC:-1800}"
+artifact_root="${SEQLOCK_READER_WRITER_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/seqlock_reader_writer_contract}"
+timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/var/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_seqlock_reader_writer_contract_${timestamp}}"
+generated_at_utc="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
+run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
+manifest_path="${run_dir}/suite_run_manifest.json"
+trace_id="${SEQLOCK_READER_WRITER_TRACE_ID:-trace.rgc.621b}"
+decision_id="${SEQLOCK_READER_WRITER_DECISION_ID:-decision.rgc.621b}"
+policy_id="${SEQLOCK_READER_WRITER_POLICY_ID:-policy.rgc.621b}"
+run_id="run-seqlock-reader-writer-contract-${timestamp}"
+source_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"
+suite_commands_path="${run_dir}/suite_commands.txt"
+
+mkdir -p "$run_dir"
+
+run_rch() {
+  RCH_BUILD_TIMEOUT_SEC="${rch_build_timeout_sec}" \
+    rch exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" "$@"
+}
+
+declare -a commands_run=()
+failed_command=""
+manifest_written=false
+
+run_step() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  shift
+  commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  echo "==> $command_text"
+  if ! run_rch "$@"; then
+    failed_command="$command_text"
+    return 1
+  fi
+}
+
+verify_bundle() {
+  local artifact
+  for artifact in \
+    seqlock_reader_writer_contract.json \
+    retry_budget_policy.json \
+    incumbent_fallback_matrix.json \
+    run_manifest.json \
+    events.jsonl \
+    commands.txt \
+    trace_ids.json \
+    env.json \
+    manifest.json \
+    repro.lock \
+    summary.md; do
+    [[ -f "${run_dir}/${artifact}" ]] || {
+      echo "missing required artifact: ${artifact}" >&2
+      return 1
+    }
+  done
+
+  jq -e '.schema_version == "franken-engine.rgc-seqlock-reader-writer-contract.v1"' \
+    "${run_dir}/seqlock_reader_writer_contract.json" >/dev/null
+  jq -e '.accepted_candidates | length >= 1' \
+    "${run_dir}/seqlock_reader_writer_contract.json" >/dev/null
+  jq -e '.schema_version == "franken-engine.rgc-seqlock-rw-run-manifest.v1"' \
+    "${run_dir}/run_manifest.json" >/dev/null
+  jq -e '.contract_hash != null and .retry_policy_hash != null and .fallback_matrix_hash != null' \
+    "${run_dir}/run_manifest.json" >/dev/null
+}
+
+run_mode() {
+  case "$mode" in
+    check)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract
+      ;;
+    test)
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract
+      ;;
+    clippy)
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    run)
+      run_step "cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- --artifact-dir ${run_dir} --trace-id ${trace_id} --decision-id ${decision_id} --policy-id ${policy_id} --run-id ${run_id} --generated-at-utc ${generated_at_utc} --source-commit ${source_commit} --toolchain ${toolchain} --summary" \
+        cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- \
+          --artifact-dir "${run_dir}" \
+          --trace-id "${trace_id}" \
+          --decision-id "${decision_id}" \
+          --policy-id "${policy_id}" \
+          --run-id "${run_id}" \
+          --generated-at-utc "${generated_at_utc}" \
+          --source-commit "${source_commit}" \
+          --toolchain "${toolchain}" \
+          --summary
+      verify_bundle
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test seqlock_reader_writer_contract --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- -D warnings
+      run_step "cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- --artifact-dir ${run_dir} --trace-id ${trace_id} --decision-id ${decision_id} --policy-id ${policy_id} --run-id ${run_id} --generated-at-utc ${generated_at_utc} --source-commit ${source_commit} --toolchain ${toolchain} --summary" \
+        cargo run -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_seqlock_reader_writer_contract -- \
+          --artifact-dir "${run_dir}" \
+          --trace-id "${trace_id}" \
+          --decision-id "${decision_id}" \
+          --policy-id "${policy_id}" \
+          --run-id "${run_id}" \
+          --generated-at-utc "${generated_at_utc}" \
+          --source-commit "${source_commit}" \
+          --toolchain "${toolchain}" \
+          --summary
+      verify_bundle
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|run|ci]" >&2
+      exit 2
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local outcome dirty_worktree idx comma
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi
+  manifest_written=true
+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    outcome="pass"
+  else
+    outcome="fail"
+  fi
+
+  if git diff --quiet --ignore-submodules HEAD -- >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    dirty_worktree=false
+  else
+    dirty_worktree=true
+  fi
+
+  printf '%s\n' "${commands_run[@]}" >"${suite_commands_path}"
+
+  {
+    echo "{"
+    echo '  "schema_version": "franken-engine.rgc-seqlock-rw-run-manifest.v1",'
+    echo '  "component": "seqlock_reader_writer_contract",'
+    echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\","
+    echo "  \"trace_id\": \"${trace_id}\","
+    echo "  \"decision_id\": \"${decision_id}\","
+    echo "  \"policy_id\": \"${policy_id}\","
+    echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\","
+    echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\","
+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${source_commit}\","
+    echo "  \"dirty_worktree\": ${dirty_worktree},"
+    echo "  \"generated_at_utc\": \"${generated_at_utc}\","
+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\","
+    if [[ -n "${failed_command}" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\","
+    fi
+    echo '  "commands": ['
+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$((${#commands_run[@]} - 1))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '  ],'
+    echo '  "artifacts": {'
+    echo "    \"command_log\": \"${suite_commands_path}\","
+    echo "    \"contract\": \"${run_dir}/seqlock_reader_writer_contract.json\","
+    echo "    \"retry_budget_policy\": \"${run_dir}/retry_budget_policy.json\","
+    echo "    \"incumbent_fallback_matrix\": \"${run_dir}/incumbent_fallback_matrix.json\","
+    echo "    \"runner_manifest\": \"${run_dir}/run_manifest.json\","
+    echo "    \"suite_manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\""
+    echo '  },'
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/seqlock_reader_writer_contract.json\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${run_dir}/run_manifest.json\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"${0} ci\""
+    echo '  ]'
+    echo "}"
+  } >"${manifest_path}"
+}
+
+trap 'write_manifest $?' EXIT
+run_mode
